summary: auth captcha login leaves the visible Chrome running so the user can finish signing in.
reason: Login returned at the page-load event and the deferred close() called allocCancel(), which kills the ExecAllocator-launched browser ~1s in — the window vanished before sign-in. cmd.Context() is context.Background() (plain rootCmd.Execute), so a launched window survives process exit on its own per the persistent-reconnect design; only tear it down when navigate fails.
